Configuration settings for the Quark BSP target in the JerryScript project on the Zephyr OS.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines various build and runtime options for a software project targeting the Zephyr operating system on the Intel Quark platform. It enables specific features and services such as auto service initialization (`CONFIG_AUTO_SERVICE_INIT`), console management (`CONFIG_CONSOLE_MANAGER`), and panic handling on bus errors (`CONFIG_PANIC_ON_BUS_ERROR`). The file also configures hardware-specific components like the Quark SE ADC (`CONFIG_SERVICES_QUARK_SE_ADC`), GPIO (`CONFIG_SERVICES_QUARK_SE_GPIO`), and SPI flash (`CONFIG_SPI_FLASH_W25Q16DV`). Additionally, it sets parameters for logging, memory pool management, and specifies the target board as `arduino_101` (`CONFIG_ZEPHYR_BOARD`). These settings ensure that the software is correctly built and operates with the intended features and hardware support.
